mapper.select: SELECT ID, INSTCD, USERID, NAME, CHANGEDESC, STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TBHISTORY WHERE INSTCD = #{instCd} AND STATUS = 'SUBMITTED' ORDER BY UPDATED_AT DESC

SELECT ID, INSTCD, USERID, NAME, CHANGEDESC, STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TBHISTORY WHERE STATUS = 'SUBMITTED' AND INSTCD IN
#{instCd}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBHISTORY SET NAME = #{name}, UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE TBHISTORY SET CHANGEDESC = #{snapshotName}, UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE TBHISTORY SET STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBAUDITLOG (ACTIONNM, PAYLOAD, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{action}, #{auditMap}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
